zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare於1421年出生在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達梅諾斯時，他的父親John Fitzmaurice Fitzgerald 6th Earl of Kildare36歲，母親Margaret de la Herne36歲。他於大約1442年與Dorothea O´More結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1470年在愛爾蘭度布林被列為chief governor serving as justiciar and deputy lieutenant under henry vi and edward iv。他去世於1477年3月24日在愛爾蘭庫迪 吉爾達享年56歲，埋葬在愛爾蘭度布林。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare于1421年出生在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達梅諾斯时，他的父亲John Fitzmaurice Fitzgerald 6th Earl of Kildare36岁，母亲Margaret de la Herne36岁。他于大约1442年与Dorothea O´More结婚。他们至少是1个儿子的父母。他于1470年在爱尔兰度布林被列为chief governor serving as justiciar and deputy lieutenant under henry vi and edward iv。他去世于1477年3月24日在爱尔兰庫迪 吉爾達享年56岁，埋葬在爱尔兰度布林。

nameMeanings.name: FitzGerald
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Jarrell
meanings: English (Kent and Middlesex; of Norman origin): variant of Jarrold, itself a variant of Gerald .

variants.name: Fitz
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare was born in 1421, in Maynooth, County Kildare, Ireland, his father, John Fitzmaurice Fitzgerald 6th Earl of Kildare, was 36 and his mother, Margaret de la Herne, was 36. He married Dorothea O´More about 1442. They were the parents of at least 1 son. In 1470, his occupation is listed as chief governor serving as justiciar and deputy lieutenant under henry vi and edward iv in Dublin, Ireland. He died on 24 March 1477, in County Kildare, Ireland, at the age of 56, and was buried in Dublin, Ireland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare est né en 1421, à Maynooth, County Kildare, Irlande, son père, John Fitzmaurice Fitzgerald 6th Earl of Kildare, avait 36 ans et sa mère, Margaret de la Herne, avait 36 ans. Il a épousé Dorothea O´More environ 1442. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. En 1470, sa profession de son indiquée est chief governor serving as justiciar and deputy lieutenant under henry vi and edward iv à Dublin, Irlande. Il est décédé le 24 mars 1477, à County Kildare, Irlande, à l’âge de 56 ans, et a été enterré à Dublin, Irlande.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare 1421 in Maynooth, County Kildare, Irland geboren wurde, war sein Vater John Fitzmaurice Fitzgerald 6th Earl of Kildare 36 und seine Mutter Margaret de la Herne 36. Er hat um 1442 Dorothea O´More geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1470 ist sein Beruf als chief governor serving as justiciar and deputy lieutenant under henry vi and edward iv in Dublin, Irland aufgeführt. Er starb am 24. März 1477 im Alter von 56 Jahren in County Kildare, Irland und wurde in Dublin, Irland begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare è nato il nel 1421 nel Maynooth, County Kildare, Irlanda, il suo padre, John Fitzmaurice Fitzgerald 6th Earl of Kildare, aveva 36 anni e il suo madre, Margaret de la Herne, aveva 36 anni. Lui sposato Dorothea O´More circa 1442. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Nel 1470, la sua occupazione è indicata come chief governor serving as justiciar and deputy lieutenant under henry vi and edward iv nel Dublin, Irlanda. Morì il 24 marzo 1477, nel County Kildare, Irlanda, all'età di 56 anni, e fu sepolto a Dublin, Irlanda.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildareが1421年にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアメイノオスで生まれた時，父John Fitzmaurice Fitzgerald 6th Earl of Kildareは36歳，母Margaret de la Herneは36歳であった。約1442年にDorothea O´Moreと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。1470年，アイルランドダブリンでの職業はchief governor serving as justiciar and deputy lieutenant under henry vi and edward ivと記録されている。彼は1477年3月24日にアイルランドコウントイ キルダアで56歳で死去し，アイルランドダブリンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare(이)가 1421년 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르 메이노스에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 John Fitzmaurice Fitzgerald 6th Earl of Kildare(은)는 36세였고, 그의 어머니 Margaret de la Herne(은)는 36세였다. 그는 대략 1442년 Dorothea O´More(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1470년, 그의 직업은 아일랜드 드블린에서 chief governor serving as justiciar and deputy lieutenant under henry vi and edward iv이었다. 그는 1477년 3월 24일 아일랜드 카운티 킬더르에서 56세의 나이로 사망했으며 아일랜드 드블린에 묻혔다.

pt.from October 1470 to July 1475: de outubro de 1470 a julho de 1475
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare nasceu em 1421, em Maynooth, County Kildare, Irlanda, seu pai, John Fitzmaurice Fitzgerald 6th Earl of Kildare, tinha 36 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de la Herne, tinha 36 anos. Ele casou-se com Dorothea O´More aproximadamente 1442. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Em 1470, sua profissão aparece como chief governor serving as justiciar and deputy lieutenant under henry vi and edward iv em Dublin, Irlanda. Ele faleceu em 24 de março de 1477, em County Kildare, Irlanda, com 56 anos, e foi sepultado em Dublin, Irlanda.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare родился в 1421 г. в местности меинут, коунти каилдар, Ирландия, его отцу по имени John Fitzmaurice Fitzgerald 6th Earl of Kildare было 36 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de la Herne, 36. Он женился на женщине по имени Dorothea O´More около 1442 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1470 году он работал по профессии chief governor serving as justiciar and deputy lieutenant under henry vi and edward iv в местности дублинь, Ирландия. Он умер 24 марта 1477 г. в местности коунти каилдар, Ирландия в возрасте 56 лет и был похоронен в местности дублинь, Ирландия.

es.from October 1470 to July 1475: desde octubre de 1470 hasta julio de 1475
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas FitzGerald 7th Earl of Kildare nació en 1421, en Maynooth, County Kildare, Irlanda, su papá, John Fitzmaurice Fitzgerald 6th Earl of Kildare, tenía 36 años y su mamá, Margaret de la Herne, tenía 36 años. Se casó con Dorothea O´More aproximadamente 1442. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. En 1470, su ocupación registrada era chief governor serving as justiciar and deputy lieutenant under henry vi and edward iv en Dublin, Irlanda. Murió el 24 de marzo de 1477, en County Kildare, Irlanda, a la edad de 56 años, y fue sepultado en Dublin, Irlanda.
